main.description: A location on the hoop design world — a node of 'the infinite game' that anchors a conversation thread. The rkey is the deterministic place id `<x>-<y>` so collaborators converge on the same place by world coordinate.

glyph.description: Single display glyph drawn on the canvas (e.g. ◆ ⌂ ⚙).

kind.description: Free-form category: hub, system, lore, sandbox, threshold…

summary.description: What this part of the game is for.
